prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年武汉大学在海南省综合类最低录取位次分别约为657名、562名、669名、666名、525名，整体波动较大，2025年位次明显前移至525名，为近五年最优 水平；2021–2023年计划均为43人，2024年降至41人，2025年回升至42人。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 武汉大学为985工程、211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从2021–2024年第9名升至2025–2026年第8名，学校综合实力稳居全国顶尖行列；2026年声誉评价偏负面，涉及学校管 理、校园安全、师德师风等舆情事件较多，可能对部分考生报考意愿产生一定抑制作用；抖音热度排名第19位（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，正面宣传效应明显；法学A+、马克思主义理论A+、测绘科学与技术A+、地球物理学A+、水利工程A、生物学A、工商管理A、计算机科学与技术A-、软件工程A-、口腔医学A-等，学科实力雄厚，对 考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热，武汉大学在上述领域均有A-及以上学科支撑；海南省2026年考生总数约78,00 0人（较2025年67,408人增长约15.7%），竞争显著加剧，无明显变化信号。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次525名、2026年海南省考生人数大 幅增长（+15.7%）带来的竞争加剧、学校声誉偏负面对报考热情的潜在抑制，以及软科排名上升和抖音高热的部分正面对冲，预计2026年武汉大学在海南省综合类最低录取位次将 较2025年小幅后移。预测最低位次约555名，区间488–622名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 法学（含国际法试验班）
- 计算机类（计算机学院）
- 口腔医学（五加三一体化）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息类
- 经济学类
- 遥感科学与技术
- 数学类
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工商管理类
- 建筑类
- 工科试验班（水利类）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间488–622名内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业为冲刺、三档专业为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如480名以内）可重点冲击法学、计算机类等一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（如600名以后）建议优先考虑二档专业并确保三档保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Wuhan University in Hainan Province's comprehensive category were approximately 657, 562, 669, 666, and 525 respectively, showing significant fluctuations overall. In 2025, the ranking notably advanced to 525, the best level in the past five years. The enrollment plan was 43 from 2021 to 2023, dropped to 41 in 2024, and rebounded to 42 in 2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Wuhan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science China University Ranking rose from 9th in 2021–2024 to 8th in 2025–2026, with comprehensive strength firmly among the top in the country. In 2026, reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, involving many public opinion incidents related to school management, campus safety, and teacher ethics, which may partially suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity ranking is 19th (high heat), with large exposure on short video platforms, showing a clear positive publicity effect. Disciplines such as Law A+, Marxist Theory A+, Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology A+, Geophysics A+, Water Conservancy Engineering A, Biology A, Business Administration A, Computer Science and Technology A-, Software Engineering A-, and Stomatology A- demonstrate strong academic strength, attracting candidates significantly.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular. Wuhan University has A- or above disciplinary support in these fields. In 2026, the total number of candidates in Hainan Province is approximately 78,000 (an increase of about 15.7% from 67,408 in 2025), significantly intensifying competition, with no obvious change signals.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 525 in 2025, the substantial increase in Hainan Province candidates in 2026 (+15.7%) intensifying competition, the potential suppression of application enthusiasm due to somewhat negative school reputation, and the partial positive offset from the rise in Soft Science ranking and high Douyin heat, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Wuhan University in Hainan Province's comprehensive category in 2026 will slightly decline compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 555, with a range of 488–622.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Law (including International Law Experimental Class)
- Computer Science (School of Computer Science)
- Stomatology (5+3 Integrated Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Electronic Information
- Economics
- Remote Sensing Science and Technology
- Mathematics
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Business Administration
- Architecture
- Engineering Experimental Class (Water Conservancy)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Within the predicted ranking range of 488–622, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, Tier 1 majors as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 480), one can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Law and Computer Science. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., after 600), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 2 majors and ensure Tier 3 as a safety net.
